# Paper and formalization coverage

One place to see **which source papers** the survey maps, **whether a
machine-checked formalization exists**, and **where it lives** in the atlas.
Generated from [`registry.yaml`](../../registry.yaml) and
[`landscape.yaml`](../../landscape.yaml). Headline coverage still means
reproduced `EXACT`/`EQUIVALENT` only; `RELATED` and landscape rows are listed
but do not increase that count. See also [formalization status](formalization-status.md)
and [atlas index](atlas-index.md).

## Landscape (non–Table-1)

These are first-class provenance or public Lean surface **outside** the
headline 44-row coverage count.

| ID | Name | Framework | Declaration / atlas | Reproduction | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| LAND-ATTR-001 | Attribution impossibility (DASH trilemma) | Lean | `AISafetyAtlas.Explainability.attribution_impossibility` | `lake build AISafetyAtlas (vendored axiom-free trilemma)` | Core Rashomon/faithfulness trilemma only; upstream GBDT axiom layers not vendored. |
| LAND-GS-001 | Gibbard–Satterthwaite theorem | Isabelle/HOL | `Gibbard_Satterthwaite` | `scripts/reproduce_isabelle.sh arrow` | Reproduced AFP landscape formalization (Isabelle). Lean interface is LAND-GS-002. |
| LAND-GS-002 | Gibbard–Satterthwaite theorem (Lean / SocialChoiceLean) | Lean | `AISafetyAtlas.SocialChoice.gibbard_satterthwaite` | `lake build AISafetyAtlas; python3 scripts/check_print_axioms.py` | Classical GS: resolute + unanimous + strategy-proof ⇒ dictatorial (3 ≤ \|A\|). Vendored GS closure from SocialChoiceLean 4.31 port (ballot shim); multi-file mirror under vendor/SocialChoiceLean/. Not full SocialChoiceLean. Isabelle twin is LAND-GS-001. |
| LAND-NFL-001 | No-free-lunch theorem for machine learning (Shalev-Shwartz–Ben-David §5.1) | Isabelle/HOL | `no_free_lunch_ML` | `scripts/reproduce_isabelle.sh nfl` | Statement-level triage (CT-2, 2026-07-19): matches SSBD Thm 5.1 — for binary classification with 2*m < \|space X\|, every learner admits a realizable distribution on which P[L(A(S)) > 1/8] >= 1/7. Session depends only on HOL-Probability. Reproduction log recorded in docs/provenance/ct2-nfl-triage.md. Lean Wolpert NFL (docs/provenance/lean-wolpert-nfl.md) does not replace or cover this entry. |
| LAND-PE-001 | Parfit mere addition / conditional normative reasoning (Åqvist E) | Isabelle/HOL | `mere_addition encodings (Parent–Benzmüller CondNormReasHOL)` | `scripts/reproduce_isabelle.sh condnorm` | A1 (2026-07-19): AFP CondNormReasHOL — Åqvist system E + Parfit mere-addition use case. Not Arrhenius BY-008 coverage. Evidence: docs/provenance/a1-condnorm-parfit-triage.md. |
| LAND-DL-001 | Deep vs shallow network capacity (Cohen–Bentkamp) | Isabelle/HOL | `fundamental_theorem_network_capacity` | `scripts/reproduce_isabelle.sh deep-learning` | A2 (2026-07-19): AE almost-all weights, deep model not matchable by shallow width Z < r^(N/2). Landscape RELATED to BY-035; not headline EXACT. Evidence: docs/provenance/a2-deep-learning-by035-triage.md. |
| LAND-VNM-001 | von Neumann–Morgenstern expected utility | Lean | `vNM.vNM_theorem` | `scripts/reproduce_vnm.sh` | Reproduced provenance; not an atlas Lake dependency. |
| LAND-TCS-ARROW-001 | Fourier-analytic Arrow theorem (TCSLib) | Lean | `ArrowTheorem.arrow_theorem` | — | Source-inspected only; deferred until a named theorem needs Fourier structure. |
| LAND-MELO-001 | Melo et al. inner-alignment decision problem (Rice packaging) | Lean | `AISafetyAtlas.Verification.AgentBehavior.no_behavioral_safety_verifier` | `lake build AISafetyAtlas.Verification.AgentBehavior` | Related-literature landscape entry (see docs/guide/related-literature.md). Atlas tracks Rice packaging of their stated decision problem; architecture half not formalized. Does not increase headline coverage. |

## AI safety literature (how addressed)

Literature-first coverage estimation (Melo-style packaging, robot ethics,
etc.) lives in the hand map
[`related-literature.md`](../guide/related-literature.md)—not theorem-first.
Some rows also appear as survey BY IDs above; do not double-count headline
EXACT/EQUIVALENT. Optional `LAND-*` / `atlas-ref-*` keys support packaging.

Regenerate: `python3 scripts/generate_registry_views.py`.
